title: sports-registry — validation rules
description: Eight custom Laravel validation rules published by RegistryServiceProvider::boot() so any FormRequest / Data class can validate registry-adjacent fields. Named after their intent so they read cleanly at the composition site.

rules.name: valid_sport_key
rules.description: Syntactic check ONLY — ensures the value matches `^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$` (lowercase snake_case, starts with letter, no hyphens). Does NOT verify the slug exists in the catalog (use `sport_key_registered` for that). Applied on POST forms + downstream Wave 3 modules' write paths.
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be a valid sport key (lowercase, snake_case, starts with a letter).

rules.name: valid_discipline_key
rules.description: Syntactic check for discipline slugs. Same regex as valid_sport_key but returns a discipline-scoped error message.

rules.name: valid_hex_color
rules.description: Ensures the value is a well-formed CSS hex color literal — either 3-digit shorthand (#RGB) or 6-digit full (#RRGGBB). Case-insensitive. Rejects the 8-digit ARGB form (alpha channel not used in the sports catalog visualisation).
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be a valid hex color (#RGB or #RRGGBB).

rules.name: valid_iconify_identifier
rules.description: Ensures the value matches an Iconify icon identifier pattern (`{set}:{name}`). Regex: `^[a-z0-9-]+:[a-z0-9-]+$`. Examples: `mdi:soccer`, `game-icons:basketball-ball`, `heroicons:academic-cap`. Does NOT verify the icon actually exists in the Iconify registry — that's the frontend's rendering-time concern.
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be a valid Iconify identifier (e.g. `mdi:soccer`).

rules.name: sport_key_registered
rules.description: Verifies that the sport_key exists in the tenant's merged catalog (platform-seeded + own tenant customs). Delegates to SportKeyResolver::resolve(). Default scope: `active` (rejects deactivated slugs). `historical` scope also accepts deactivated slugs (used when validating historical enrollment writes that reference an old sport_key).

params.name: scope
params.description: active = must be is_active=true; historical = accepts deactivated as well.

rules.default_message: The :attribute must be a registered sport key on this tenant.

rules.name: discipline_belongs_to_sport
rules.description: Cross-field validator. Ensures the discipline_key is a real Discipline slug belonging to the Sport identified by the sport_key_field (e.g. `discipline_key=basketball_5v5` under `sport_key=basketball` — valid; `discipline_key=basketball_5v5` under `sport_key=football` — invalid).

params.name: sport_key_field
params.description: Field name on the Data object holding the parent sport_key.

rules.default_message: The :attribute must be a discipline of the selected sport.

rules.name: position_belongs_to_discipline
rules.description: Cross-field validator. Ensures the position_key is a real Position slug belonging to the Discipline identified by the discipline_key_field.
